mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.code AS keyword, NULL AS description FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT r.id, r.name, r.code AS keyword, NULL AS description FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE p.url = #{path} AND p.enabled = 1
